headline: Investors Hoped for a World Cup Bump. Instead, They Got a Slump.
summary: While Saturday’s games will take place in the U.S., the excitement is mostly elsewhere, after the U.S. was knocked out of the tournament. Investors looking for a World Cup bump might be feeling similarly let down.
